title: pyrola picta var. pallida
intro: Pyrola picta var. pallida, also known as pale wintergreen, is a variety of the wintergreen plant that belongs to the heath family (Ericaceae). The plant contains methyl salicylate, which is a compound with analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, and is often used to relieve pain and reduce fever. The medicinal properties of pale wintergreen have been used to treat various health issues, including arthritis, sore muscles, and respiratory problems, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and acting as an antiseptic. Pale wintergreen can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in traditional herbal medicine to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
